verdict.note: The pinned xterm renderer held its old 63-row DOM through synchronized output and applied the 44-row resize only with the complete buffered repaint.

freshness re-measure on branch @508a9578 (predev re-asserted patch installer): shrinking a visible busy terminal while the bridge commits a new grid under DEC 2026 — the renderer stayed at the old grid until the hold closed, then painted the committed grid complete; frames at/after the commit show no old-buffer-reflowed-at-new-dimensions state. Engine module carries both patch markers (verified in the B bundle probe).
